ATF.settings.menuHint: Set two approved token appearances players can switch between.
ATF.hud.outOfSync: Current art matches neither form — click to choose
ATF.hud.noGM: No Game Master online — switching unavailable
ATF.config.hint: Configure two approved token images per character. Only players who own the character can switch, and only between the images you set here.
ATF.config.noActors: No player-owned characters found. Assign a character to a player, then reopen this window.
ATF.dialog.outOfSyncContent: This token's current artwork does not match either configured appearance. Which one should it become?
ATF.errors.imagesMustDiffer: Image A and Image B must be different.
ATF.errors.notEnabled: Appearance switching is not enabled for this character.
ATF.errors.notOwner: You do not own this character.
ATF.errors.expired: The switch request expired. Please try again.
ATF.errors.noImage: The selected appearance has no image.
ATF.errors.syncFailed: Could not switch appearance. The previous artwork was restored.
